nasb.text: and He will wipe away every tear from their eyes; and there will no longer be any death; there will no longer be any mourning, or crying, or pain; the first things have passed away.”

esv.text: He will wipe away every tear from their eyes, and death shall be no more, neither shall there be mourning, nor crying, nor pain anymore, for the former things have passed away.”

cnv.text: 他要抹去他們的一切眼淚，不再有死亡，也不再有悲哀、哭號、痛苦，因為先前的事都過去了。”

ccb.text: 上帝要擦干他们所有的眼泪，再没有死亡、忧伤、哭泣和痛苦，因为以前的事都已成过去。”

csbs.text: 神要从他们的眼中抹去一切泪水。 将来不再有死亡， 也不再有悲伤、哭泣或痛苦， 因为先前的事已经过去了。”
